creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Oliver, you have failed for nine months to provide a way to reproduce the failure, which may be from your local configuration, or from bugs in the infrastructure.  

We need to identify the root cause of the troubles on your computer and then treat that, not add what I perceive as workarounds to individual ports.  The latter isn't going to scale.

And since you fail to provide ways to reproduce this, I have closed the bug report.  The patch is rejected.  You need to collaborate if you want things to improve.
